name: Whole Wheat Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheets with shortening.
In a large mixer bowl, combine shortening, sugar, molasses, honey, egg, apple juice, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well-blended.
In another bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Mix into creamed mixture at low speed until just blended.
Stir in oats, raisins, and nuts with a spoon.
Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto baking sheets.
Bake for 13 to 14 minutes, or until set. Cool for 5 minutes on the baking sheet. Remove to a cooling rack.
